# Browser Action Testing Skill

## Objective
Reproduce UI issues with deterministic user interactions and assertions.

## Workflow
1. Open target page in authenticated context.
2. Perform exact user actions (click/fill/select/submit).
3. Wait on explicit UI or network conditions.
4. Assert expected visible outcomes and API status.
5. Capture console errors and failed request details.

## Evidence
- Steps executed
- Actual vs expected result
- Request/response summary
- Console/network anomalies
